underlying_goal: Execute phase 9 (release packaging) of a multi-phase project pipeline: create context, plan, and execute release packaging including license, metadata, lint fixes, README, GitHub repo setup, CI, and v0.1.0 tag
friction_detail: Subagent pushed orphan commits requiring force-push fix, and v0.1.0 tag pointed to wrong commit requiring recreation.
brief_summary: User triggered the phase 9 release packaging pipeline (discuss→plan→execute) which Claude completed end-to-end, fixing CI issues and creating a tagged v0.1.0 public GitHub release.
